result.summary: NLP Cloud exposes one authenticated HTTP API with a published OpenAPI spec; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
result.description: NLP Cloud provides hosted natural language processing and generative AI models through an API, including tasks such as summarization, entity extraction, classification, translation, and speech features. Its public documentation centers on calling model-specific HTTP endpoints with an API token.

nlpcloud_api_token.label: NLP Cloud API token
nlpcloud_api_token.setup: Sign in to the [NLP Cloud dashboard](https://nlpcloud.com/home/). The official docs link to [Get an API key](https://nlpcloud.com/home/) from the docs sidebar. Use the issued token in the `Authorization` header as `Token <your_api_token>`.
